shortDescription.default: Centralized document repository for AbbVie R&D strategic documents with metadata tagging, search, and role-based access control.

longDescription.default: The Document Repository is a SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part that provides a centralized platform for uploading, searching, viewing, and managing AbbVie R&D strategic documents. Features include structured metadata tagging with cascading dropdowns, synonym-based search, document preview in the browser, archive and replace workflow, auto-generated file naming, CSV export, and role-based access control through AD Groups (Administrator, Contributor, Viewer). All documents are stored in SharePoint Online with no external dependencies.

features.title: spectra-document-repository Feature
features.description: The feature that activates elements of the spectra-document-repository solution.
